Career Profile

Hello, this is Kim Dohoon from Seoul, Korea. I'm now majoring Data Science and Biomedical Engineering at Hanyang University, Seoul. I'm interested in AI techniques such as computer vision for medical application. Ultimately, I want to build general healthcare systems using AI.

Experience

Research Intern
BAIK Lab 2024.03.-
I started research intern by taking "Laboratory Practice of Intelligent Computing" class, at BAIK Lab. Supported by Prof. Sungyong Baik, I'm now studying multi-modal learning and zero-shot task.
